textByHashes.9a7114af6361256c9d3fc977653c0e510d1b4a47: Hello Effendi! How can I help you?
textByHashes.f7a2ce46ab573a714d91af0af40ed03f8bc5b7ec: Oooh, sir is looking for a really very special item then! You must go and talk to our very illustrious leader, Al Shabim. He's located in the largest tent in our village.
textByHashes.8c633a712a488acdf829027f901363d782b70c8a: This is the camp of the Bedabin. Talk to our leader, Al Shabim, he'll be happy to chat. We can sell you very reasonably priced water...
textByHashes.08a7e2b08326bd753a0b8a52d46495d078876dd3: It is North East of here effendi, across the trackless desert. It will be a thirsty trip, can I interest you in a drink?
